name: Workerlly Tech Private Limited
description:
Workerlly Tech Private Limited (founded in Aug 2024) is an Indian private company (startup with 10+ team members) that operates a tech-driven platform called Workerlly — designed to connect workers with people or businesses that need help on an hourly basis.

Workerlly (the app/platform) started in the Panchkula–Chandigarh–Mohali region and is working toward wider (Pan-India) availability to serve a broader gig economy audience.

The company aims to modernize the informal work sector  by:

Helping workers earn flexibly by choosing jobs that fit their skills and schedules.

Allowing households and businesses to find verified workers quickly for short-duration tasks.

Reducing reliance on middlemen, simplifying hiring, and improving income opportunities for blue-collar or white colors workers.

name: Zylectra
description:
Zylectra is a deep-tech startup redefining the standards of battery safety and reliability. Unlike traditional diagnostic tools that rely solely on historical data patterns, Zylectra utilizes Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) to understand the underlying electrochemical and thermal stressors that "kill" batteries.

Our MVP provides a "crystal ball" for battery health, offering high-fidelity failure predictions (accurate to the day/month) and multi-modal root cause analysis. By bridging the gap between pure AI and physical reality, we provide manufacturers and fleet operators with actionable intelligence to prevent catastrophic failures, optimize charging habits, and extend the remaining useful life (RUL) of energy assets. At Zylectra, we don't just say a battery is bad; we explain why and tell you exactly how to fix it.


We're incubated at VentureLab Thapar, secured 4 lakhs grants from MeitY TIDE 2.0, 1 lakh prize from TiE Chandigarh Global Finale. Strategic interest shown in product by Maruti Suzuki and Mercedes Benz.
